loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing panel-level event aggregates; supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and contribute zero to the rollup.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing panel-aggregate narrative — per-member roster values are filled from member meters; some members (GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N10, GIC-15-N11, GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7) are dark and honest-blank.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event timeline for 6 active feeders; 4 members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current distribution for 8 feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no live data) and render as blanks.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing sag, swell, current, and neutral event counts per panel; voltage max/min are not measured by this meter, so vAvg is used as a proxy for voltage magnitude.
